debug_info.goal:
⊢ ∃ θ,
    ∀ (x : EnchantedForest.Introduction.Bird),
      EnchantedForest.Introduction.response x (EnchantedForest.Introduction.response θ x) =
        EnchantedForest.Introduction.response θ x

proof:
use (S ◁ L) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((S ◁ L) ◁ L) ◁ x = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) by S.call
      -- x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) by L.call
      rw [S.call]
      rw [← L.call x (L ◁ x)]
failed_attempts:
use L ◁ (B ◁ M ◁ L)
      intro x
      simp only [L.call, B.call, M.call]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      -- x ◁ (θ ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      -- By Lark: (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := L.call x (L ◁ x)
      rw [h1, h2, h3, ← h2, ← h1]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      -- x ◁ (θ ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      -- (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      calc x ◁ (((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x) 
          = x ◁ (M ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [B.call]
        _ = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := by rw [L.call]
        _ = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x := by rw [B.call]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      -- x ◁ (θ ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      -- By L.call: (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := L.call x (L ◁ x)
      rw [h1, h2]
      rw [h1, h2] at h3
      exact h3.symm

use ((B ◁ M) ◁ L)
      intro x
      simp only [B.call, M.call]
      rw [L.call]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := L.call x (L ◁ x)
      rw [h1, h2, h3]
      rw [← h2, ← h1]

use S ◁ L ◁ L
      intro x
      rw [S.call]
      rw [L.call]

use B ◁ M ◁ L
      intro x
      simp only [B.call, M.call, L.call]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by
        have := L.call x (L ◁ x)
        exact this.symm
      rw [h1, h2]
      rw [h1, h2]
      exact h3.symm

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- (B ◁ M ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      -- and x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) by L.call
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [L.call]
      rw [h1, h2, h3]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := (L.call x (L ◁ x)).symm
      rw [h1, h2, h3]

use L ◁ L
      intro x
      rw [L.call, L.call]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := (L.call x (L ◁ x)).symm
      rw [h1, h2, h3, ← h2, ← h1]

use B ◁ M ◁ L
      intro x
      calc (B ◁ M ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := by rw [B.call]
        _ = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [L.call]
        _ = x ◁ (M ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = x ◁ ((B ◁ M ◁ L) ◁ x) := by rw [B.call]

use (S ◁ L) ◁ L
      intro x
      have h1 : ((S ◁ L) ◁ L) ◁ x = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := S.call L L x
      have h2 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := L.call x (L ◁ x)
      rw [h1, h2]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      calc x ◁ ((((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x))
          = x ◁ (M ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [B.call]
        _ = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := by rw [L.call]
        _ = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x := by rw [B.call]

use L ◁ (B ◁ M ◁ L)
      intro x
      calc x ◁ ((L ◁ (B ◁ M ◁ L)) ◁ x) 
          = x ◁ ((B ◁ M ◁ L) ◁ (x ◁ x)) := by rw [L.call]
        _ = x ◁ (M ◁ (L ◁ (x ◁ x))) := by rw [B.call]
        _ = x ◁ ((L ◁ (x ◁ x)) ◁ (L ◁ (x ◁ x))) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = x ◁ ((x ◁ x) ◁ ((L ◁ (x ◁ x)) ◁ (L ◁ (x ◁ x)))) := by rw [L.call]
        _ = (x ◁ x) ◁ ((L ◁ (x ◁ x)) ◁ (L ◁ (x ◁ x))) := by rw [← L.call]
        _ = (B ◁ M ◁ L) ◁ (x ◁ x) := by rw [← M.call, ← B.call]
        _ = (L ◁ (B ◁ M ◁ L)) ◁ x := by rw [← L.call]

use L ◁ L
      intro x
      simp only [L.call]

use L ◁ (B ◁ M ◁ L)
      intro x
      simp only [L.call, B.call, M.call]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := L.call x (L ◁ x)
      rw [h1, h2, h3, ← h2, ← h1]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := (L.call x (L ◁ x)).symm
      rw [h1, h2] at h3 ⊢
      exact h3.symm

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      -- (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := L.call x (L ◁ x)
      rw [h1, h2, h3]

use (S ◁ L) ◁ L
      intro x
      rw [S.call]
      rw [L.call]

use L ◁ L
      intro x
      simp only [L.call]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      rw [B.call]
      rw [M.call]
      rw [L.call]

use B ◁ M ◁ (L ◁ (B ◁ M) ◁ (L ◁ (B ◁ M)))
      intro x
      simp only [B.call, M.call, L.call]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by
        have := L.call x (L ◁ x)
        exact this.symm
      rw [h1, h2, h3]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      have h1 : ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := B.call M L x
      have h2 : M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := M.call (L ◁ x)
      have h3 : (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := (L.call x (L ◁ x)).symm
      rw [h1, h2, h3, ← h2, ← h1]

use (B ◁ M) ◁ L
      intro x
      simp only [B.call, M.call]
      rw [L.call]

use L ◁ L
      intro x
      rw [L.call]
      rw [L.call]
successful_attempts:
use (S ◁ L) ◁ L
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((S ◁ L) ◁ L) ◁ x = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) by S.call
      -- x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) by L.call
      rw [S.call]
      rw [← L.call x (L ◁ x)]

use ((B ◁ M) ◁ L)
      intro x
      -- θ ◁ x = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x = M ◁ (L ◁ x) = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)
      -- x ◁ (θ ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      -- By L.call: (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x))
      calc x ◁ (((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x) 
          = x ◁ (M ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [B.call]
        _ = x ◁ ((L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x)) := by rw [M.call]
        _ = (L ◁ x) ◁ (L ◁ x) := by rw [← L.call]
        _ = M ◁ (L ◁ x) := by rw [← M.call]
        _ = ((B ◁ M) ◁ L) ◁ x := by rw [← B.call]
